comment.body:
I know Cem, he’s a smart guy, but not the smartest, and his reputation in MM circles isn’t as great as it’s made out to be. He’s had a lot of bad calls, some really bad ones...
I remember when Cem called the same crash post-Feb OPEX last year, and everyone was on his dick..meanwhile, Alma, Our Lady, said it’s going up, called NVDA ER up, etc.
BTW, he follows her and liked a decent amount of her posts before they made likes private.
So be careful with furus..there’s a reason they’re pushing him forward this much

comment.body: Take financial education for what it is. Learning to fish, instead of eating the fish. That is why every provider out there has a Disclaimer. If trading, "make the trade yours" Brian Shannon. If lose its me, if win its me. Its just taking shots on probable outcomes. I feel for content providers when they get pressured or judged because someone's trade did not work. Execution is completely different story to analysis. Even if one is told that markets will rally tomorrow. Poor execution will somehow lose you $.

comment.body:
Bro, happy to help..even you if you need it.
What did Alma say? If vol settles down, spot can break through zero vanna since we were on the left side of the fly structure. We already crossed the center, probably flipped vanna with low vol too.
From here, charm turns supportive if vol stays calm, which makes mechanical sense 'cause of veta decays. But power hour will tell

comment.body:
Hi CMik, could you tell if I understand this right? 
When spot on zero vanna, if it goes up it flip to positive vanna (Vol up, delta up), and we got negative charm here (time decay, delta down). So if spot could break out, it need vol stays clam, and negative charm become supportive, overall MM's net delta goes down as time decay, so they forced to buy back and support the spot goes up.
